## Checklist

- [ ] The bash script works with bash 3.2+ (macOS default)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data included
- [ ] `VERSION` and `package.json` are bumped together (if releasing)
- [ ] Changes to `core/workflow/*.md` or skills are intentional and documented
